prompt: Write an accessibility statement for ShopEasy e-commerce site. Partially conforms to WCAG 2.1 AA with 3 known issues: PDFs (SC 1.1.1, 4.1.2), live chat (SC 4.1.3), video audio descriptions (SC 1.2.5). Last audit March 15, 2024.

expectations.text: Correctly uses 'partially conforms' conformance status (not 'fully conforms')
Lists all three known non-conformances with correct SC references
expectations.evidence: All three issues listed with SC references 1.1.1, 4.1.2, 4.1.3, 1.2.5

expectations.text: Includes contact information and feedback mechanism
expectations.evidence: Contact section with placeholder email included and 2-business-day response target

expectations.text: Includes date of last assessment (March 15, 2024) and testing methodology
expectations.evidence: March 15, 2024 date included; automated tools, NVDA, VoiceOver testing mentioned

expectations.text: Includes formal complaints procedure (required for EU Web Accessibility Directive)
expectations.evidence: Mentions escalation to 'national enforcement authority' but does not name specific EU enforcement bodies or multi-jurisdiction complaint pathways; less complete than with-skill response
